title: Diagnostics, Profiling, Allocation, PGO, Security Gates, and Production Defense · Execution Trace: Security Supply Chain Release
summary: A release is slow under load, grows memory, has a suspected goroutine leak, and includes a dependency advisory. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go security supply chain release increment in a measured production release and operations dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Gate current toolchain patches, tests, race and fuzz evidence, govulncheck reachability, dependency provenance, reproducible builds, and rollback.
Benchmark a representative baseline, form a causal hypothesis, inspect profiles, change one factor, validate behavior, and evaluate PGO portability.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
